shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && rg --files | head -80 && rg -n "maxZoom|Zoom|zoom" src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -160'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '300,345p' src/types.ts && sed -n '55,95p' src/types.ts && sed -n '1,150p' test/unit/test-utils.tsx && cat package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"maxZoomPixelRatio|supports:\" README.md docs website dev test src | head -120 2>/dev/null || true && sed -n '1,130p' src/index.ts && sed -n '1,100p' src/plugins/index.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,110p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts && sed -n '1,60p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts && sed -n '1,45p' src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx && sed -n '1,35p' src/plugins/zoom/props.ts && git diff --check && git diff"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '100,140p' test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts && sed -n '1,100p' test/unit/plugins/Video.spec.ts && sed -n '1,130p' src/modules/Carousel.tsx && npx tsc --noEmit"

/bin/bash -lc 'npx prettier --write src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts src/plugins/zoom/index.ts src/plugins/zoom/props.ts test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts && npx vitest run test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts'

/bin/bash -lc 'npx prettier --check src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts src/plugins/zoom/index.ts src/plugins/zoom/props.ts test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts'
/bin/bash -lc 'npx vitest run test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts && npm run lint -- --no-warn-ignored'
